title: jasminum didymum var. typicum
intro: Jasminum didymum var. typicum, also known as star jasmine, is a fragrant flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its star-shaped white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of star jasmine include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and potentially lowering blood pressure due to its calming and sedative effects. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the star jasmine plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
